summary: Frontend code review and verification of Statistics page demo data feature, premium restrictions, and web/mobile feature parity. Google OAuth required for live UI testing.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Statistics.tsx (lines 69-98): Demo data correctly defined - DEMO_EGG_DATA, DEMO_ECONOMY_DATA, DEMO_EXPECTED_VS_ACTUAL, DEMO_PER_HEN_DATA
✅ Statistics.tsx (lines 101-102): hasRealData and showDemoData logic properly implemented - shows demo when no real egg data exists
✅ Statistics.tsx (lines 407-413): Demo data notice banner displays 'Exempeldata visas' with correct styling from .demo-data-notice class
✅ Statistics.tsx (line 443): Egg production LineChart correctly renders DEMO_EGG_DATA when showDemoData=true
✅ Statistics.tsx (line 471): Economy PieChart correctly renders DEMO_ECONOMY_DATA when showDemoData=true
✅ Statistics.tsx (lines 495-523): 'Expected vs Actual' premium graph has .locked class and blur(8px) filter when !isPremium
✅ Statistics.tsx (lines 526-556): 'Per-Hen' premium graph has .locked class and blur(8px) filter when !isPremium
✅ Statistics.css (lines 7-31): .demo-data-notice styling properly defined with warning amber colors and gradient background
✅ Statistics.css (lines 527-565): .lock-overlay and .lock-content styling provides clear premium upgrade UI
test_credentials: Google OAuth required - no test credentials available
context_for_next_testing_agent: Statistics demo data feature verified via code review. Web app requires Google OAuth for live UI testing. Demo data displays when user has no real egg data.

Web Statistics - Demo data banner (Exemp.details: Shows 'Exempeldata visas - Börja logga ägg för att se din egen statistik!' when showDemoData=true

Web Statistics - Egg production LineChar.details: LineChart renders DEMO_EGG_DATA array with 10 days of sample egg counts when showDemoData=true

Web Statistics - Economy PieChart with d.details: PieChart renders DEMO_ECONOMY_DATA with Intäkter (450kr green) and Kostnader (180kr red) when showDemoData=true

Web Statistics - Premium 'Expected vs Ac.details: Graph has .locked class, lock-overlay with 🔒 icon, 'Uppgradera till Premium' message, and blur(8px) filter when !isPremium

Web Statistics - Premium 'Per-Hen' graph.details: Graph has .locked class, lock-overlay with 🔒 icon, 'Uppgradera till Premium' message, and blur(8px) filter when !isPremium

details.parity_status: GOOD - Core features present on both platforms

details.statistics_graphs: Expected vs Actual and Per-Hen graphs unlock when isPremium=true
details.health_log: Server restricts POST /api/health-logs and returns [] for GET for free users (verified in iteration_5)
details.hatching_module: Server restricts POST /api/hatching for free users (verified in iteration_5)
details.feature_customization: Server restricts PUT /api/feature-preferences for free users (verified in iteration_5)

live_ui_testing.reason: Google OAuth required for authentication - landing page accessible but protected routes require login
live_ui_testing.landing_page_verified: YES - Shows Hönsgården branding with 'Kom igång gratis med Google' login button
